ab: kahiya’, yako rima’ ray ’asang payrarongaw hi baki’.
ch: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ab: yami honaehnge: ila ’okik kakita’, yako maSriyae’ hi siya.
ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven’t seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: baki’ komita’ ’iyakin, pasi’ael ka ba:ay o parae’oe: ka kashaw ’iyakin.
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝茶。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

ab: ni baki’ pinamowa’ ka ba:ay ’anhil, sa’owaz kayzaeh a tomal si’aelen.
ch: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: yako ma’ minowa’ ni baki’ ka kashaw, kayzaeh rae’oe:on.
ch: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa’s tea, it’s tasted good too.

ab: ray ’ima hila:an, yako ki koko’ ma’onhael tikinsi’ael.
ch: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: ni koko tinalek ’akoey a ta:an, hayza’ ka ’aelaw, hayza’ ka tata:a’, hayza’ ka lilom, hayza’ ka mona:.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有蝸牛。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

ab: komsi’ael sizaeh, yami rima’ ray tatimae’an titatimae’.
ch: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: koko’ mari’ ’akoey ka ’aewpir, rokol ki ’oe’ong, Sipa’alibih ’iyakin ray taew’an.
ch: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ab: yako ki lasiya papil’awan ila, So: honasamez ila ’am mowa:i’ naehan komita’ hi lasiya.
ch: 我跟他們道別，說下次有空再去看他們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I’d see them next time.
